title: Mellow Middle Eastern Couscous Pilaf
description: A hearty and comforting solo dinner dish featuring fluffy couscous, infused with the warm and earthy flavors of the Middle East, made using sous-vide for perfect doneness and adhering to Ayurvedic tamasic-friendly principles.
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 180 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together couscous and salt.
Add 1 3/4 cups of water to the bowl and cover it with a plate or plastic wrap.
Let the couscous soak for about 5 minutes until the water is absorbed and the couscous is fluffy.
In a separate pan, heat olive oil over medium heat.
Add diced onion to the pan and cook until it is translucent.
Add minced garlic, grated carrots, and diced zucchini to the pan and cook for about 5 minutes until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in ground cumin, smoked paprika, and black pepper.
Fluff the cooked couscous with a fork and mix it with the vegetable mixture.
Place the couscous pilaf in a sous-vide bag and seal it.
Cook the pilaf in the sous-vide machine for 30 minutes.
